menu.title: AWS BOSS BATTLE
menu.subtitle: SAA-C03 practice exam, gamified. Defeat every domain boss.
menu.hint: Correct answers damage the boss. Wrong answers cost a heart and the question returns until you beat it.
menu.modes_hint: Same question pool, three different ways to sweat.
mode.survival.name: Survival
mode.survival.desc: Three wrong answers end the run. No heart regen. How far can you go?
mode.decay.name: Points Decay
mode.decay.desc: Start with 1000 points. A wrong answer costs 100, a correct one earns 50. Hit 0 and the run is over.
mode.pet.name: Save the Pet
mode.pet.desc: Answer 20 questions correctly to save your pet. Three wrong answers and it is game over.
battle.rematch: REMATCH - beat this question to continue
battle.miss: The boss strikes back!  -1 heart. This question will return.
battle.tip: Tip: read the explanations - the same questions get easier every run.
run.survival_over: Three strikes. The cloud claims another architect.
run.pet_saved: Your %s is safe thanks to your AWS knowledge!
run.pet_lost: Your %s needed 20 correct answers. Study and try again!
run.final_score: Final score: %d correct out of %d answered
custom.title: CUSTOM QUIZ
custom.subtitle: Build your own question sets or import the book site's exported JSON. Game modes draw from the active set; boss battles always use the built-in bank.
custom.import_hint: Load a .json file or paste JSON below — either a bare array of questions or {"questions": [...]}, the same schema as the built-in bank.
custom.name_required: Give the set a name first.
custom.answers: Correct key(s), e.g. A or A,C
lb.title: LEADERBOARD
lb.subtitle: Top local runs per mode — stored only on this device.
lb.empty: No entries yet. Finish a run and save your score!
